steps.title: Use the innovation details
steps.content: The text presents Reed's album as the first peer-reviewed rap album, explains its unusual review by scholars and rap artists, and describes its hybrid mixtape-and-essay form.

steps.title: Reject narrower purposes
steps.content: A compares public impact, which the text does not do. B mentions one scholar's opinion, but no such opinion is presented. D overstates the focus on peer review steps; the text only mentions peer review briefly. The answer is C.
